authors.author: Spiritual
Spiritual
Geht, ruft es von den Bergen

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In the foothills of sorrow Looking up from the valley of fear You can see doubt off in the distance And you’re about to lose heart right here But don’t ever give in don’t ever give up God is in you and you’ll overcome

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The mountain will tell you That you can’t make it over It will try to convince you that it’s way too high Though you feel defeated Know that God keeps His promise So you tell the mountain Just how big your God is

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Just try to remember All the trials he’s brought you through And when his power gave you strength for the journey The very hour you needed it to So don’t be discouraged Cause time after time God’s never failed you Go on and climb
